text: Trump posts close-up photos of White House Correspondents’ Dinner attacker.
text_zh: 特朗普发布了白宫记者协会晚宴袭击者的特写照片。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰 Pakistani PM Sharif comments on WHCD shooting: Deeply shocked by the disturbing shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner in Washington, D.C., a short while ago. Relieved to know that President Trump, the First Lady,…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump posts footage of moment shooting happened. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫就白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件发表评论：对刚才在华盛顿特区举行的白宫记者协会晚宴上发生的令人不安的枪击事件深感震惊。得知特朗普总统、第一夫人……平安无事，我感到宽慰。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普发布了枪击发生瞬间的视频。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 It's called the White House Correspondents DINNER for a reason. This guy was determined to finish it. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 这被称为白宫记者“晚宴”是有原因的。这家伙决心要把它搞砸。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸Several White House correspondents have alerted that the only thing necessary to enter the Washington Hilton ballroom for the WHCD was their ticket. Prior to entering the building there was no security screening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Pakistani PM Sharif comments on WHCD shooting: Deeply shocked by the disturbing shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner in Washington, D.C., a short while ago. Relieved to know that President Trump, the First Lady, and other attendees are safe. My thoughts and prayers are with him, and I wish him continued safety and well-being. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 多名白宫记者提醒说，进入华盛顿希尔顿酒店宴会厅参加白宫记者协会晚宴唯一需要的就是门票。在进入大楼之前没有进行安全检查。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫就白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件发表评论：对刚才在华盛顿特区举行的白宫记者协会晚宴上发生的令人不安的枪击事件深感震惊。得知特朗普总统、第一夫人和其他与会者平安无事，我感到宽慰。我的思念和祈祷与他同在，我祝愿他持续平安健康。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸Reuters: The shooter fired at a Secret Service agent with a shotgun. The agent was hit in an area with protective gear and was not harmed. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Several White House correspondents have alerted that the only thing necessary to enter the Washington Hilton ballroom for the WHCD was their ticket. Prior to entering the building there was no security screening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 路透社：枪手用霰弹枪向一名特勤局特工开火。特工被击中防护装备区域，没有受伤。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 多名白宫记者提醒说，进入华盛顿希尔顿酒店宴会厅参加白宫记者协会晚宴唯一需要的就是门票。在进入大楼之前没有进行安全检查。 @wfwitness

text: Erika Kirk left the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in tears after the shooting.
text_zh: 埃里卡·柯克在枪击事件后含泪离开了白宫记者协会晚宴。

text: 🇺🇸 Video of TPUSA CEO Erika Kirk being evacuated from the White House Correspondents dinner. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国转折点组织（TPUSA）首席执行官埃里卡·柯克从白宫记者协会晚宴被撤离的视频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ White House currently 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 白宫目前 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: WarMonitor Clearer audio of the gunshots from inside the ballroom. Reports so far say the shooter was a 30-year-old male from California. https://x.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048201155663012186/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 宴会厅内更清晰的枪声音频。目前的报告称枪手是一名来自加利福尼亚州的30岁男性。 https://x.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048201155663012186/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A U.S. Secret Service agent was shot Saturday night near the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, sources told CNN. The round struck protective gear. The agent was transported to a local hospital. Condition remains unclear. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048223909913268423/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 消息人士告诉CNN，周六晚上在白宫记者协会晚宴附近，一名美国特勤局特工被枪击。子弹击中了防护装备。该特工已被送往当地医院。目前情况尚不清楚。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048223909913268423/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 Washington Post: The WHCD shooter, Cole Tomas Allen, is alive and was transported to a local hospital. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Reuters: The shooter fired at a Secret Service agent with a shotgun. The agent was hit in an area with protective gear and was not harmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 华盛顿邮报：白宫记者协会晚宴枪手科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Tomas Allen）还活着，已被送往当地医院。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 路透社：枪手用霰弹枪向一名特勤局特工开火。特工被击中防护装备区域，没有受伤。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical The WHCD shooter is alive and has been transported to a local hospital -WAPO tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 白宫记者协会晚宴枪手还活着，已被送往当地医院 - 华盛顿邮报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Conflicting reports on the suspect's status following shooting at WHCA Dinner in Washington, D.C. NewsNation and CNN, citing a U.S. Secret Service source, report the suspect is dead. However, new video appears to show the suspect on the ground as authorities respond. Individual seen on the ground as U.S. Secret Service responds at Washington Hilton following gunfire at WHCA Dinner in Washington, D.C. https://x.com/FactbaseFeed/status/2048210704415498365/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 关于华盛顿特区白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件后嫌疑人的状况，报道相互矛盾。NewsNation和CNN援引美国特勤局消息人士的话称，嫌疑人已经死亡。然而，新的视频似乎显示嫌疑人在当局做出反应时倒在地上。在华盛顿特区白宫记者协会晚宴发生枪击事件后，美国特勤局做出反应时，可以看到个人倒在地上。 https://x.com/FactbaseFeed/status/2048210704415498365/video/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: WarMonitor This is true. The whca dinner is one of the most guarded and secured dinners of the entire year. Multiple security screenings at multiple levels of the hotel. Shocked a gun could even get close - Sam Stein tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这是真的。白宫记者协会晚宴是全年安保最严密的晚宴之一。酒店多层设有多次安全检查。对竟然有枪能靠近感到震惊 - 山姆·斯坦 推文

text: WarMonitor The moment the President and Vice President were evacuated from opposite sides of the stage at the Correspondents Dinner. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048219650937254043/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 总统和副总统在记者晚宴上从舞台两侧被撤离的瞬间。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048219650937254043/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Individual seen on the ground as U.S. Secret Service responds at Washington Hilton following gunfire at WHCA Dinner in Washington, D.C. https://x.com/FactbaseFeed/status/2048210704415498365/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 在华盛顿特区白宫记者协会晚宴发生枪击事件后，美国特勤局做出反应时，可以看到个人倒在地上。 https://twitter.com/FactbaseFeed/status/2048210704415498365/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Video appears to show the immediate aftermath of the shooting outside the ballroom where the White House Correspondents Dinner was taking place. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048219040766669160/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 视频似乎显示了白宫记者协会晚宴举办地宴会厅外枪击事件后的直接后果。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048219040766669160/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Suspect in White House Correspondents Dinner shooting is reportedly alive and in custody. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index） 据报道，白宫记者协会晚宴枪击案嫌疑人还活着并已被拘留。 推文

text: Mexican President Sheinbaum: It's great that President Trump and his wife are doing well after the recent events. We send our respect. Violence should never be the way.
text_zh: 墨西哥总统辛鲍姆：很高兴特朗普总统和他的妻子在最近的事件后安然无恙。我们表示敬意。暴力绝不应该是解决问题的方式。

text: WarMonitor Now being told the shooter survived and is in custody. The president is expected to speak, though most of the press are still at the event, so questions may be limited. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 现在被告知枪手幸存并已被拘留。预计总统将发表讲话，尽管大多数媒体人员仍在活动现场，因此提问可能会受到限制。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 Video of JD Vance and Donald Trump being evacuated from the stage of the White House Correspondents dinner event. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯和唐纳德·特朗普从白宫记者协会晚宴舞台上被撤离的视频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "BREAKING: Trump was just rushed off the stage during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner." The attacker is alive and has been transported to a local hospital. Source: WaPo

text: 🇺🇸 Crazy Larry Loomer, Trump whisperer and main villain of the "Saw" movies, is already trying to blame Muslims. Also, how does one "ram a car" while on foot? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

He is allegedly Cole Thomas Allen, a 31-year-old teacher from Torrance, California. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 Another image of the alleged White House Correspondents' Dinner shooter Cole Thomas Allen, posted by Caltech (California Institute of Technology) on their Facebook page in 2017. Identity has not been officially confirmed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 一个名字正在网上流传，与白宫记者协会晚宴枪手有关。据称他是科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen），一名来自加利福尼亚州托伦斯的31岁教师。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 加州理工学院（California Institute of Technology）2017年在其Facebook页面上发布的另一张据称是白宫记者协会晚宴枪手科尔·托马斯·艾伦的照片。身份尚未得到官方确认。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: U.S. President Donald Trump will be delivering a statement in the Press Briefing Room. U.S. President Donald Trump: "Law Enforcement has requested that we leave the premises, consistent with protocol, which we will do, immediately. I will be giving a press conference in 30 minutes from the White House Press Briefing Room. The First Lady, plus the Vice President, and all Cabinet members, are in perfect condition. We will be speaking to you in a half an hour. I have spoken with all the representatives in charge of the event, and we will be rescheduling within 30 days." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 突发：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普将在新闻发布室发表声明。美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“执法部门已要求我们按照协议离开现场，我们将立即执行。我将在30分钟后在白宫新闻发布室举行新闻发布会。第一夫人、副总统以及所有内阁成员状况良好。我们将在半小时后与你们交谈。我已经与负责该活动的所有代表进行了交谈，我们将在30天内重新安排时间。” - 开源情报 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says that law enforcement has requested everyone must leave the premises, consistent with protocol and he will give a press conference in 30 minutes from the White House Press Briefing Room, the event will be rescheduled in the next 30 days. tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普表示，执法部门已要求所有人必须按照协议离开现场，他将在30分钟后在白宫新闻发布室举行新闻发布会，活动将在未来30天内重新安排。 推文

We will be speaking to you in a half an hour. I have spoken with all the representatives in charge of the event, and we will be rescheduling within 30 days." tweet

text: OSINTtechnical Trump confirms that he is leaving the WHCD, will be giving a press conference from the White House in half an hour. Dinner will be rescheduled to a later date. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048214889945018516/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普证实他正在离开白宫记者协会晚宴，并将于半小时后在白宫举行新闻发布会。晚宴将改期至晚些时候举行。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048214889945018516/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News NYT reporting that Trump is leaving the Washington Hilton https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048214273814319436/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 《纽约时报》报道称特朗普正在离开华盛顿希尔顿酒店 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048214273814319436/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Chief of Communications for the U.S. Secret Service (USSS) Anthony Guglielmi has released a statement, saying that the USSS is investigating the shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048214262829498410/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国特勤局（USSS）通讯主管安东尼·古列尔米（Anthony Guglielmi）发表声明称，美国特勤局正在调查白宫记者协会晚宴上的枪击事件。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048214262829498410/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News Sources tell CNN that a law enforcement officer took a shot to the vest BREAKING: Shooter at the WHCD event was carrying what appeared to be "a rifle and magazines" and the person "fell flat" on the ground, a witness tells WSJ https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048210013118689532/photo/1 - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 消息人士告诉CNN，一名执法人员被击中背心。突发：白宫记者协会晚宴活动的枪手携带了看起来像“步枪和弹匣”的东西，一名目击者告诉《华尔街日报》，此人“平躺”在地上 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048210013118689532/photo/1 - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Secret Service says a shooting occurred near the main magnetometer screening area at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Trump and all protectees are safe. Suspect’s condition remains unconfirmed, though NewsNation initially reported earlier that the suspect is deceased. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048213544156406241/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 美国特勤局表示，白宫记者协会晚宴的主磁力计筛查区附近发生了枪击事件。特朗普和所有受保护人员均安全。嫌疑人的状况仍未得到证实，尽管NewsNation早些时候最初报道称嫌疑人已死亡。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048213544156406241/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Reported image of the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooter in custody https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048213383451750573/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 据报道白宫记者协会晚宴枪手被拘留的图像 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048213383451750573/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The White House Correspondents' Dinner service is resuming. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 白宫记者协会晚宴服务正在恢复。 推文

text: Open Source Intel VIDEO: 🔴 Panic inside Washington Hilton following gunfire during White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048212420431134834/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 视频：🔴 白宫记者协会晚宴期间发生枪击事件后，华盛顿希尔顿酒店内一片恐慌。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048212420431134834/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump confirms that "The shooter has been apprehended." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048212201916207616/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普证实“枪手已被逮捕。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048212201916207616/photo/1 推文
